title: Life-prolonging drug for advanced ovarian cancer gets go-ahead in England
description: Elahere is first new drug for chemotherapy-resistant ovarian cancer to be approved by NHS for 20 years
content:
Hundreds of women with hard-to-treat ovarian cancer can now be offered a new life-prolonging treatment, after NHS England approved its introduction. It is the first new drug for resistant ovarian cancer to be approved for more than 20 years.
Ovarian ... [3331 chars]

title: Nissan maps out deal to build cars for China’s Chery at its Sunderland plant
description: Non-binding agreement to start assembling vehicles in 2027 would safeguard jobs at UK’s largest car factory
content:
Nissan has agreed to look at building cars in northern England for Chinese manufacturer Chery, in a move that would secure jobs at the UK’s largest car factory and begin mass-market Chinese car production in Britain for the first time.

title: Alex Younger, former head of MI6, dies aged 62
description: Keir Starmer says Younger led an ‘exemplary life’, while foreign secretary says country owes him ‘an enormous debt of gratitude’
content:
Alex Younger, the former head of MI6, has died at the age of 62 after being treated for cancer.
Younger led the Secret Intelligence Service, the agency also known as MI6, between 2014 and 2020.

title: Germany blames Russia for failed UN Security Council bid
description: Johann Wadephul said it was "no secret" Russia had stirred up sentiment against Germany over its support for Ukraine.
content:
Germany's foreign minister says support for Ukraine and Israel may have cost votes after Berlin failed to secure a rotating spot on the UN Security Council.

title: What a hair loss breakthrough could mean for women like me
description: As scientists edge closer to new treatments for hair loss, Victoria Derbyshire examines what such breakthroughs could mean for women.
content:
I vividly remember the moment my hair began to fall out.
